monsters_index.title: D&D 2024 Monster Manual API
monsters_index.description: Comprehensive collection of monster stat blocks for Dungeons & Dragons 2024
monsters_index.total_monsters: Growing collection covering CR 0 to CR 23 across all major creature types
monsters_index.organization: Individual JSON files for each monster with consistent schema

aberrations.description: Alien entities with bizarre anatomy and strange powers

constructs.description: Artificial beings created through magic or technology

dragons.description: Ancient, powerful reptilian creatures with breath weapons and magic

elementals.description: Creatures native to the elemental planes

fey.description: Magical creatures from the Feywild with otherworldly abilities

fiends.description: Evil creatures from the Lower Planes (demons and devils)

giants.description: Towering humanoids with great strength and elemental affinities

celestials.description: Divine beings from the Upper Planes with holy powers

humanoids.description: Bipedal civilized creatures including humans and human-like beings

oozes.description: Amorphous creatures that dissolve and consume organic matter

beasts.description: Natural animals and creatures from the material plane including dinosaurs

undead.description: Once-living creatures animated by necromantic magic

plants.description: Vegetative creatures, including awakened and mobile plants

monster_files.name: Hydra
signature_abilities: Head regeneration (2 heads per lost head)

2024_format.initiative_total: Shows initiative modifier + 10 for quick reference
2024_format.simplified_saves: Only shows saves the creature is proficient in
2024_format.damage_formatting: Includes both average and dice formula

integration.rules_system: Uses rules/ directory for combat mechanics, conditions, and damage types
integration.character_system: Humanoid monsters can use class features and backgrounds

usage_for_dms.encounter_building: CR system helps balance encounters for party level
usage_for_dms.narrative_hooks: Tactical info provides roleplay and story opportunities
usage_for_dms.combat_reference: Quick access to abilities, resistances, and special rules
usage_for_dms.scaling: Monster variants and templates for different challenge levels

expansion_plans.additional_monsters: Continue adding monsters from 2024 Monster Manual
expansion_plans.monster_variants: Templates for scaling difficulty and creating variants
expansion_plans.encounter_tools: Integration with encounter building and balancing systems
expansion_plans.lair_actions: Expand legendary creatures with full lair action rules

schema_reference.description: Defines structure and validation rules for all monster stat blocks
schema_reference.consistency: Ensures uniform data format across all monsters
